name: Gemini Diffusion
tagline: DeepMind research demo: first large-scale text-diffusion model, ~1,479 tokens/sec, waitlist-only.
metaDescription: Gemini Diffusion (Google), released 2025-05-20 — part of the Gemini Diffusion / DiffusionGemma line. DeepMind research demo: first large-scale text-diffusion m…
overview: Gemini Diffusion is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Diffusion / DiffusionGemma line. Released 2025-05-20. Experimental text-diffusion line that generates text by denoising blocks in parallel for much higher throughput.
What's notable in this version: DeepMind research demo: first large-scale text-diffusion model, ~1,479 tokens/sec, waitlist-only.
